mapper.select:
SELECT o.id, f.`name` AS frame, s.`name` AS supplier, o.`time`, o.`number`, o.`total`, o.`actual`, o.`money`, COALESCE(b.sum, 0) AS writeOffAmount, a.`name` AS account, p.`name` AS people, o.examine, o.nucleus, u.`name` AS user, o.`data` FROM oce o LEFT JOIN (SELECT pid, SUM(money) AS sum FROM oce_bill GROUP BY pid) b ON b.pid = o.id LEFT JOIN frame f ON f.id = o.frame LEFT JOIN supplier s ON s.id = o.supplier LEFT JOIN people p ON p.id = o.people LEFT JOIN account a ON a.id = o.account LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = o.`user` WHERE o.id IN
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oce(id, frame, supplier, time, number, total, actual, money, account, people, file, data, more, examine, nucleus, user) VALUES(#{id}, #{frame}, #{supplier}, #{time}, #{number}, #{total}, #{actual}, #{money}, #{account}, #{people}, #{file}, #{data}, #{more}, #{examine}, #{nucleus}, #{user})
mapper.select: SELECT id, frame, supplier, time, number, total, actual, money, account, people, file, data, more, examine, nucleus, user FROM oce WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM account WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM frame WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM people WHERE id = #{id}
